recommendations.title: Criminal Activities
recommendations.overview: Four young men make a risky investment together that gets them into trouble with the mob.

recommendations.title: Ruben Brandt, Collector
recommendations.overview: Psychotherapist Ruben Brandt becomes the most wanted criminal in the world when he and four of his patients steal paintings from the world's most renowned museums and art collections.

recommendations.title: How to Steal a Million
recommendations.overview: A woman must steal a statue from a Paris museum to help conceal her father's art forgeries.

recommendations.title: Mad Money
recommendations.overview: Three female employees of the Federal Reserve plot to steal money that is about to be destroyed.

recommendations.title: The Cable Guy

recommendations.title: Wild Card
recommendations.overview: When a Las Vegas bodyguard with lethal skills and a gambling problem gets in trouble with the mob, he has one last play… and it's all or nothing.

recommendations.title: The Pope of Greenwich Village
recommendations.overview: Charlie and his troublesome cousin Paulie decide to steal $150000 in order to back a "sure thing" race horse that Paulie has inside information on. The aftermath of the robbery gets them into serious trouble with the local Mafia boss and the corrupt

recommendations.title: Tomcats
recommendations.overview: College buddies chip in and promise that the group's last unmarried man will collect a cash pot. Seven years later, the kitty is worth $500,000 -- money Michael needs to pay a gambling debt. Problem is, the only other single guy is a hopeless womaniz

recommendations.title: This Little Love of Mine
recommendations.overview: Laura Price is a successful San Francisco lawyer on the cusp of promotion – a far cry from her childhood growing up on a tropical island with best friends Chip and Gem. When the firm’s biggest client – Chip’s grandfather – asks Laura to travel to the

recommendations.title: The Hot Rock
recommendations.overview: Dortmunder and his pals plan to steal a huge diamond from a museum. But this turns out to be only the first time they have to steal it...
